_comment: Intentional, reasoned exceptions for the public-repo-link checker (see .github/scripts/public_repo_link_check.py). A finding is suppressed only when it appears here. For the ORG-REPO existence check: 'allow' suppresses a specific (source_repo, target) pair; 'ignore_targets' suppresses a target repo wherever it is referenced; 'ignore_source_repos' skips a source repo's pages entirely. For the optional EXTERNAL liveness check (--check-external): 'ignore_external_hosts' skips a hostname everywhere; 'ignore_external_urls' skips an exact URL. For the optional DEEP org-link check (--check-deep-links): 'ignore_deep_urls' skips an exact deep URL. 'ignore_link_patterns' is a list of regexes matched against any deep/external URL (use for whole families, e.g. doc example/localhost URLs). Every entry should explain WHY. Nothing is silently passed -- un-listed dead links fail/warn per the script's severity rules.

_ignore_targets_reasons.uds-mesh: Renamed to szl-otel-mesh (now archived, still public). github.com/szl-holdings/uds-mesh HTTP 301-redirects there, so every historical reference resolves for real visitors; the old name is kept in docs intentionally.
_ignore_targets_reasons.lambda-bounty: Bounty-program repo retired/removed (HTTP 404). Historical references in bounty docs are intentional records of a closed program.
